ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "candidate_sf_id" INTEGER /* Salesforce ID of the candidate */,
  "ps_no" INTEGER /* PS number of the employee */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "email_id" TEXT /* Email ID of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* Mobile number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the employee */,
  "pincode" TEXT /* Pincode of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_code" TEXT /* Code of the training batch */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training batch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training batch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the training is conducted */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "email_id" TEXT /* Email ID of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_batches" (
  "employee_batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-batch association */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training batch */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee enrolled in the batch */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the employee completed the batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employee in the batch (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_batches_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_batches_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_details" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date of reporting to the project location */,
  "from_location" TEXT /* Location from where the employee travels */,
  "to_location" TEXT /* Location to which the employee travels */,
  "mode_of_travel" TEXT /* Mode of travel (e.g., flight, train, bus) */,
  "travel_status" TEXT /* Status of the travel (e.g., booked, cancelled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_details_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email_id" TEXT /* Email ID of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project allocation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was allocated to the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ends the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_allocations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments given by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
